description: Ingest an external PR review into local review artifacts and apply the normal review disposition flow

content: Please read AGENTS.md and follow its instructions. Use fresh disk reads and current git state, not conversational memory. Re-read `codeInfoStatus/flow-state/current-plan.json` from disk first and determine the active `plan_path`, then extract repository paths from `additional_repositories` for this flow and re-open that exact relative `plan_path` from disk. If the handoff does not explicitly identify any additional repositories, treat that as none. Re-check the current repository branch directly from git, for example with `git branch --show-current`, and re-check every additional repository branch directly from git, for example with `git -C <repo_root> branch --show-current`. Verify that the selected plan file exists in the current repository, that the story number in the current repository branch name matches the story number in the selected plan filename, and that every additional repository is still on a branch whose story number matches the selected plan filename. If those do not match, stop and say the current-plan handoff is stale and must be regenerated. Before relying on any file under `codeInfoTmp/reviews/`, verify that the repository ignores `codeInfoTmp/`. If it does not, add or update `.gitignore` before this flow continues, because review files under `codeInfoTmp/reviews/` are scratch artifacts and must not be committed. Then derive the external review input path from the selected plan story number using `codeInfoTmp/reviews/<story-number>-external-review-input.md`. Do not discover external review comments anywhere else and do not use timestamps or latest-file discovery. Verify that this external review input file exists. If it does not exist, stop and say the external review input file is missing and must be created only after `codeInfoTmp/` is ignored. Confirm the selected story, the exact external review input file path, and that this flow will treat that markdown file as the sole source of external review comments for artifact generation.

steps.label: Refresh current plan handoff after review
